ab: Kana lqlaqi, musa ta qmita rudan alang ka jiyax sayang.
ch: A:各位小朋友，今天我們要去部落探訪耆老喔!
en: A: Kids, today we’re going to visit the elders in the tribe!

ab: Wa, malu wah! Asi ta ka skari kari Seejiq wah!
ch: B:好喔!我們要跟耆老說賽德克語。
en: B: Yes! We’re going to talk to the seniors in Sederic.

ab: Uxay ta biyaw dhuq dhug?
en: A: Are we almost there?

ab: Pdhuq ta da.
en: B:Almost there.

ab: Akay balay! Ma namu mkla rmngaw kari Seejiq! Malu balay wah!
ch: B:你們會說賽德克語啊!真是太棒了!
en: B: You speak sydykes! That’s great!

ab: Kana lqlaqi, musa ta qmpah knpahan masu ka jiyax sayang.
ch: A:各位小朋友，今天我們要去小米田工作。
en: Kids, today we’re going to work in Little Rice Fields.

ab: Kiya wah, emptgsa.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: Aguh hini kana, adas qyqaya namu ni kngkingal miyah.
ch: A:大家過來，帶著你們的工具一個接著一個的來。
en: A: Come, everyone, bring your tools one by one.

ab: Iq wah! Emptgsa, mnhdu nami mangal qyqaya da.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.

ab: Dhuq ta dhug?
en: A: Are we there yet?

ab: Ini na, ida dhiyaq na.
en: B: Not yet, it’s still far away.

ab: Usa smuyuq qsiya ka isu?
en: A: You go watering.

ab: Iq! Yaku ka smuyuq qsiya.
en: B: Okay, I’ll water it.

ab: Usa mangal taktak sqliwaq qduda.
en: A: You go get the bird catcher.

ab: Iq! Yaku ka lmiwaq qduda.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: Kana lqlaqi, musa ta qlangang ssamac ka jiyax sayang.
ch: A:各位小朋友，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Kids, we are going to the zoo today.

ab: Wa, malu wah! Pshuya ta musa hug?
ch: B:好棒喔!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?

ab: Peapa ta basu musa.
en: A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: Kngkingal mhiyug psramal ta marig kipu.
ch: A:一個一個站好，我們準備買票。
en: A: Stand one by one, we are ready to buy tickets.

ab: Iq wa!
en: B: Yes.

ab: Brah o qqduda, bukuy o qquyu, usa nanaq qmita.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.

ab: Emptgsa, miisug ku quyu.
en: B: I’m afraid of snakes.

ab: Iya kiisug! saw kiya do usa qmita qduda ka isu.
en: A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: Bukuy na kingal patas hidaw do pssli ta hini duri.
ch: A:我們一個小時後再回來這裡集合。
en: A: We’ll be back here in an hour.

ab: Iq! Emptgsa mhuway su balay.
en: B: Yes, thank you.

ab: Manu ka qntaan su jiyax sayang.
en: A: What did you see today?

ab: Egu bi ka qntaan mu quyu, egu bi ka qntaan mu qduda uri.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.

ab: Nhari hari, musa ta da.
en: A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: Tgai ku han, mnarux bi ka qaqay mu.
en: B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.

ab: Tuhuy ta musa tmapaq qsiya hug?
en: A: Shall we go swimming together?

ab: Wada sayang bi.
en: B:Yes! Let’s go!

ab: Hbaraw bi seejiq ka gaga tmapaq qsiya hini.
en: A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: Mrbuq bi ka qsiya hiya, asi ta ttapaq qsiya hini
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
